'''竏嘖h-k-zh''' ('''kashakazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ecodesign|ecodesign]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-k-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ecodesign|ecodesign]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嘖h-k-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kashakazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishakazh|thishakazh]] || [[word:jishakazh|jishakazh]] || [[word:shishakazh|shishakazh]] || [[word:kishakazh|kishakazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushakazh|thuthushakazh]] || [[word:jujushakazh|jujushakazh]] || [[word:shushushakazh|shushushakazh]] || [[word:kukushakazh|kukushakazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushakazh|thushakazh]] || [[word:jushakazh|jushakazh]] || [[word:shushakazh|shushakazh]] || [[word:kushakazh|kushakazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushakazh|thushakazh]] || [[word:jushakazh|jushakazh]] || [[word:shushakazh|shushakazh]] || [[word:kushakazh|kushakazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshakazh|theshakazh]] || [[word:jeshakazh|jeshakazh]] || [[word:sheshakazh|sheshakazh]] || [[word:keshakazh|keshakazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshakazh|thothoshakazh]] || [[word:jojoshakazh|jojoshakazh]] || [[word:shoshoshakazh|shoshoshakazh]] || [[word:kokoshakazh|kokoshakazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshakazh|thoshakazh]] || [[word:joshakazh|joshakazh]] || [[word:shoshakazh|shoshakazh]] || [[word:koshakazh|koshakazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshakazh|thoshakazh]] || [[word:joshakazh|joshakazh]] || [[word:shoshakazh|shoshakazh]] || [[word:koshakazh|koshakazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦshakazh|thﾃｦshakazh]] || [[word:jﾃｦshakazh|jﾃｦshakazh]] || [[word:shﾃｦshakazh|shﾃｦshakazh]] || [[word:kﾃｦshakazh|kﾃｦshakazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashakazh|thathashakazh]] || [[word:jajashakazh|jajashakazh]] || [[word:shashashakazh|shashashakazh]] || [[word:kakashakazh|kakashakazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashakazh|thashakazh]] || [[word:jashakazh|jashakazh]] || [[word:shashakazh|shashakazh]] || [[word:kashakazh|kashakazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashakazh|thashakazh]] || [[word:jashakazh|jashakazh]] || [[word:shashakazh|shashakazh]] || [[word:kashakazh|kashakazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashakazh|shashakazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashakazh|goshashakazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashakazh|gokishashakazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashakazhnﾃｼ|shashakazhnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashakazhnknﾃｼ|goshashakazhnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashakazhnﾃｼ|gokishashakazhnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashakazhshﾃｫ|shashakazhshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashakazhnkshﾃｫ|goshashakazhnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashakazhshﾃｫ|gokishashakazhshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashakazhro|shashakazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashakazhnkro|goshashakazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashakazhro|gokishashakazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashakazhmu|shashakazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashakazhnkmu|goshashakazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashakazhmu|gokishashakazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashakazhsher|shashakazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashakazhnksher|goshashakazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashakazhsher|gokishashakazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashakazhng|shashakazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashakazhnkng|goshashakazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashakazhng|gokishashakazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashakazhya|shashakazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashakazhnkya|goshashakazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashakazhya|gokishashakazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashakazhyam|shashakazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashakazhnkyam|goshashakazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashakazhyam|gokishashakazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashakazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shashakazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashakazhnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshashakazhnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashakazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishashakazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashakazhnﾃｼro|shashakazhnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashakazhnknﾃｼro|goshashakazhnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashakazhnﾃｼro|gokishashakazhnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashakazhnﾃｼmu|shashakazhnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashakazhnknﾃｼmu|goshashakazhnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashakazhnﾃｼmu|gokishashakazhnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashakazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shashakazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashakazhnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshashakazhnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashakazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishashakazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashakazhshﾃｫro|shashakazhshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashakazhnkshﾃｫro|goshashakazhnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashakazhshﾃｫro|gokishashakazhshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashakazhshﾃｫmu|shashakazhshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashakazhnkshﾃｫmu|goshashakazhnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashakazhshﾃｫmu|gokishashakazhshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashakazhronﾃｼ|shashakazhronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashakazhnkronﾃｼ|goshashakazhnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashakazhronﾃｼ|gokishashakazhronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashakazhroshﾃｫ|shashakazhroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashakazhnkroshﾃｫ|goshashakazhnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashakazhroshﾃｫ|gokishashakazhroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashakazhromu|shashakazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashakazhnkromu|goshashakazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashakazhromu|gokishashakazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashakazhmunﾃｼ|shashakazhmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashakazhnkmunﾃｼ|goshashakazhnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashakazhmunﾃｼ|gokishashakazhmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashakazhmushﾃｫ|shashakazhmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashakazhnkmushﾃｫ|goshashakazhnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashakazhmushﾃｫ|gokishashakazhmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashakazhmuro|shashakazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashakazhnkmuro|goshashakazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashakazhmuro|gokishashakazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
